title: Cafe Manager
description:
Job Title: Café Manager

Overall Purpose

The Café Manager is responsible for the overall daily operations of the café, ensuring smooth service, high food and beverage quality, excellent customer experience, and effective staff management while achieving sales and cost targets.

Key Responsibilities

1. Operations Management

  • Oversee day-to-day café operations to ensure smooth workflow and service standards

  • Ensure compliance with SOPs, food safety, hygiene, and workplace safety regulations

  • Monitor opening and closing procedures, cash handling, and daily sales reconciliation

  • Coordinate with kitchen and service teams to ensure efficient service delivery

2. Staff Management & Leadership

  • Recruit, train, schedule, and supervise café staff

  • Conduct staff onboarding, training, and performance evaluations

  • Manage staff attendance, discipline, and manpower planning

  • Foster a positive and professional working environment

3. Customer Service

  • Ensure excellent customer experience and handle customer feedback or complaints professionally

  • Maintain service quality and consistency across all shifts

  • Build customer relationships and encourage repeat business

4. Sales & Cost Control

  • Monitor sales performance and implement strategies to increase revenue

  • Control labour costs, food costs, and operational expenses

  • Manage stock ordering, inventory control, and minimize wastage

  • Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly sales and operational reports

5. Inventory & Supplier Management

  • Oversee ordering of food, beverages, and operating supplies

  • Liaise with suppliers and vendors to ensure timely delivery and cost efficiency

  • Conduct regular stock checks and maintain accurate inventory records

6. Compliance & Administration

  • Ensure compliance with company policies and local regulations (e.g. food hygiene, MOM/NEA where applicable)

  • Maintain proper documentation such as staff records, licences, and reports

  • Implement company policies and operational standards

7. Marketing & Brand Standards

  • Ensure café presentation, cleanliness, and branding standards are upheld

  • Support marketing activities, promotions, and campaigns

  • Monitor customer trends and provide feedback to management

Requirements / Skills

  • Proven experience in F&B or café management

  • Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills

  • Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

  • Good knowledge of food safety, hygiene, and service standards

  • Basic understanding of costing, inventory, and reporting

Working Conditions

  • Willing to work shifts, weekends, and public holidays

  • Hands-on role with both service and operational responsibilities

postedCompany.description:
Craftsmen Specialty Coffee is a Singapore independent coffee shop serving variety of specialty coffee and mouth-watering brunches. Established since 2013, we are inspired to serve great coffees with quality beans, hoping to bring a great end-to-end experience for our customers in this fast-paced country. We do believe that every cup matters and we are serious when it comes to our passion in making coffee, not to mention our dishes, which are delicious and well presented on your table. Visit our outlets and grab a cuppa, tell us how you feel!

Making great coffee is the pinnacle of hard work, thousand-mile journeys, and passions. We only source for single origin coffee beans from the best grower around the world, specifically from Brazil, Honduras, Kenya, Ethiopia, Sumatra, Costa Rica, and Guatemala; each with different aroma and aftertaste to cater your preferences. We do sell those beans in packs, feel free to check out our shops for the availability of each single origin beans.
postedCompany.name: KENZEN F&B PTE. LTD.
